items.summary: In the image gallery component (frontend/src/components/ImageGallery.tsx), remove the black French Bulldog workout image from the Cardio Zone section and replace it with a photo of actual cardio equipment from the facility

Replace the homepage hero section background (frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx) with the uploaded Bodyshape Fitness 20 Year Anniversary image (86b32a34-8ef3-4143-8e81-c566b3678f98.png), applying fade/opacity effects to make it a visually striking centerpiece while maintaining readability of foreground content
